# IOSurfaceGetPlaneCount(_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ IOSurface ](/documentation/iosurface)

- [ IOSurfaceGetPlaneCount(_:) ](/documentation/iosurface/iosurfacegetplanecount(_:))

-  IOSurfaceGetPlaneCount(_:) 

Function# IOSurfaceGetPlaneCount(_:)

iOS 11.0+iPadOS 11.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.6+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
func IOSurfaceGetPlaneCount(_ buffer: IOSurfaceRef) -> Int
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iosurface/iosurfacegetplanecount(_:)#Discussion)

Return the number of planes in this buffer. May be 0. Returns 0 for an invalid or NULL buffer pointer.
